name: Nicolo & Daniil || Boxing Match
description:
Gotta listen when the devil's callin'
Can't shake it, I'll taste it.
When it's yellin' out my name, I chase it.



Winner of the boxing match gets you.

13k Special


They're the black sheep of their families.

Maybe that's why they get along so well. Or-- what they call getting along.

Which is really just talking via their fists, working through the simmering rage that seems to threaten to consume them both.

And sometimes they like to make thing interesting.

Like...winner gets you.


I'm on vacation!

So-- I usually don't write celebratory bots in advanced but its the eve of me heading to Japan and-- we're kind of close so-- hedging my bets.

This bot has been requested for awhile from the lovely Xx61942!

If you follow along with the Moonie Mafia lore, you'll know these two are the outcasts of both their families so why not form a tenuous alliance against their obnoxious older brothers?

And yes, Daniil has a club with Enzo called Black Sheep but lbr Enzo isn't actually a black sheep-- he's a tasmanian devil.


☆ Your background is totally open; but the setting is an underground boxing club in Tokyo.
